page_content:
Prerequisite: MIEH600.

Recommended: MIEH722.

MIEH730 Environmental Justice, Built Environment, and Health Disparities (3 Credits)

This course will give students the opportunity to conduct an in-depth analysis of environmental justice and environmental racism in the United States and internationally. Students will synthesize their knowledge

from environmental science courses with the concepts of civil rights and social justice to more fully understand the existing health disparities and how the built environment contributes to them.

Prerequisite: Must have completed an Environmental Health course.
